Localization.Description: A suspicious sequence of process startup by a Microsoft Office application is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A suspicious sequence is detected. The Microsoft Office application {object.process.parent.name} started the process {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}.
The Microsoft Office application {object.process.name} opened connection to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} on host {event_src.host}
